messages.content:
What kind of device can use low voltage to control high voltage?


Toggle switch


Motor


Relay


Push button
All of the mentioned devices can use low voltage to control high voltage.

For a 4-pole 3-phase squirrel cage induction motor, what is the typical rotor speed under full-load in motoring?


1500 RPM


1425 RPM


1575 RPM


1300 RPM
The typical rotor speed under full-load in motoring for a 4-pole 3-phase squirrel cage induction motor is 1500 RPM.

The advantage of pneumatic system is:


High accuracy


High cost


To drive heavy loading.


Safe
The advantage of a pneumatic system is that it is safe.

The symbol 5/2 directional valve stands for:


5 ports/2 positions directional valve


5 positions/2 positions directional valve


5 positions/2 ports directional valve


5 ports/2 ports directional valve
The symbol 5/2 directional valve stands for "5 ports/2 positions directional valve."

Which of the following is not the type of neural network?


CNN (Convolutional Neural Networks)


INN (Intelligent Neural Networks)


DNN (Dense Neural Networks)


RNN (Recurrent Neural Networks)
INN (Intelligent Neural Networks) is not a commonly used type of neural network.

Which of the following sensor is NOT proximity sensor?


Capacitive sensor


Inductive sensor


Ultrasonic sensor


Limit switch
Limit switch is NOT a proximity sensor.

Comparing with hard-wired relay control system, which of following is NOT the advantage of PLC?


More flexible in control logic


Higher control speed  


Larger output power    


Better control of real-time response
Larger output power is NOT an advantage of PLC (Programmable Logic Controller) compared to a hard-wired relay control system.

Which of the following is NOT under control of an inverter?


Input current


Output current


Output voltage


Output frequency
Input current is NOT under control of an inverter.

Which of the following is an output signal conditioning and interfacing unit?


a motor driver


a controller


an optical sensor


a motor
A motor driver is an output signal conditioning and interfacing unit.

Which of the following statement is correct if a bigger gear (Input) is used to drive a small gear (Output) in a gear system?


The output torque is not changed but the speed is increased


The output speed is not changed but the torque is increased


The output speed is increased but the torque is decreased


The output torque is increased but the speed is decreased
The correct statement is: The output speed is increased but the torque is decreased when a bigger gear (input) is used to drive a small gear (output) in a gear system.

Which of following device is an optional key element of a mechatronic system?


HMI


AC motor


Filter module


Controller
An HMI (Human-Machine Interface) is an optional key element of a mechatronic system.

An Arduino Mega board consists of:


I/O points only


CPU only


CPU with memory and I/O points


CPU with memory only
An Arduino Mega board consists of a CPU with memory and I/O points.

VFD stands for


Variable Frequency Detector


Variable Frequency Drive


Variable Feeding Drive


Voltage Feeding Device
VFD stands for "Variable Frequency Drive."
